channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. signs nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia; Nolan Wells autopsy results released
item.description: The U.S. has signed a nuclear cooperation agreement with Saudi Arabia, while the independent autopsy of Nolan Wells raises further questions.

item.title: Republicans urge Justice Department to investigate former prosecutor Jack Smith
item.description: The former special counsel led two criminal investigations of President Trump and has been frequently criticized by Trump on social media.

item.title: Chinese woman becomes first to win prestigious Fields Medal
item.description: Despite concerns over a brain drain to the U.S., the awards come as several prominent Chinese scholars have returned home.

item.title: House approves resolution to end Iran war for second time, rebuking Trump
item.description: Four Republicans joined Democrats to pass the non-binding measure, reflecting growing congressional frustration.
